title: Wireless noise-cancelling headphones

description: BPA-free, auto shut-off, 2200W fast boil. 2-year warranty. Physical product — ships boxed with manual.

description: 100% GOTS cotton, regular fit, machine washable. Available sizes S–XXL. Tangible apparel — we ship folded with tags.

description: Breathable mesh upper, rubber outsole. True to size. Shipped in original shoe box.

description: Dual 4K display, 100W PD pass-through, Ethernet, SD reader. Retail box with cables.

description: Adjustable arm, touch dimmer, 15W Qi pad. CE certified. Ships assembled in protective foam.

description: Hot-swappable switches, aluminium frame, detachable cable. Tangible peripheral — not a digital licence.

title: Wireless ergonomic mouse
description: Silent clicks, multi-device Bluetooth, rechargeable. Retail packaging.

description: Pre-seasoned, oven-safe to 260°C. Heavy item — careful packaging.
